description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat, angular roof with a prominent overhang and a mix of large floor-to-ceiling windows and smaller rectangular windows. The front facade is defined by a spacious glass-railed porch, supported by wooden posts, and a main entrance set back from the porch area. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray material, contrasted by dark trim and wood accents, giving the building a sleek, contemporary appearance. The property is surrounded by a green lawn and includes a paved walkway leading to the entrance, as well as a driveway and garage on one side. The rear and side elevations show a combination of solid wall sections and additional windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern bungalow with a flat, angular roof, large glass windows, and a spacious glass-railed porch, set within a green lawn and featuring wood and gray finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glass-railed porch, large windows, main entrance, and a mix of wood and gray wall finishes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage entrance, and the angular roof extending over the entry path.
description_view_2: Rear view with smaller windows, solid wall sections, and the continuation of the green lawn wrapping around the building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the expansive glass windows and porch area, with the roof's angular profile clearly visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing and grouped side windows
